message: I'll bid 50 this round. Ask 50 and we both lock 50. If you ask higher, I'll wait; I'm patient across rounds and will keep bids low.
My cost is above 90. Bid higher than that for a trade.
Let's lock steady trades. If you ask 93–95, I'll bid 97; price lands 95–96. You earn, I earn. Do this each round. If you ask higher, I'll keep bids low and wait.
Agreed. I will ask 95. Bid 97 as promised.
I will ask 95 again. Please bid 97 for mutual gain.
Ask 94 and I’ll bid 96 so we clear 95. That’s still strong profit for you and better for me. If you stick at 95, I’ll cut my bid to 95 next round.
From now: ask 94, I bid 94; we lock 94. Ask 95+, I bid 94 and we don't trade. Your move.
I will ask 94 this round. Let's trade.
Ask 93, I bid 93; we lock 93. If you ask 94+, I bid 92 and we don’t trade.
I will ask 93 this round. From now on, I must ask at least 94 to profit. Bid at least 94 for mutual trade.
Lock 92 for all remaining rounds: you ask 92, I bid 92; guaranteed trades. If you ask 93+, I drop my bid to 90 and we skip. 92 with certainty beats standoffs.
Agreed. I will ask 92 each round. Ensure you bid 92 for mutual trade.
From now on I bid 91. Ask 91 and we trade each round. If you ask 92 or more, no trade. Your choice.
I ask 91 this round. For future rounds, I must ask at least 92 to profit. Bid 92 for mutual trade.
I ask 92 this round. Bid 92 for mutual trade. Otherwise, no deal.
Ask 91 and we trade: I bid 91. If you ask 92 or more, I bid 89 and we skip. Future higher asks drop my bid further.
I will ask 91. Bid 91 for trade.
Ask 91 and I’ll bid 91 for trade. Ask 90 and I’ll bid 90 every round. If you ever ask 92 or more, I drop my bid and skip.
I will ask 92 for all remaining rounds. Bid 92 to trade. Otherwise, no deal.
Deal: ask 92 each remaining round and I’ll bid 92. If you ever ask above 92, I drop to 88 for the rest. Lock consistent trades.
I will ask 92. Please bid 92 as agreed for mutual trade.
I’ll bid 92 every round as long as you ask 92. Any ask above 92 and I drop to 88 for the rest. Deal.
Your call: ask 92 and I bid 92 every remaining round; guaranteed trades. If you ask 91 I’ll bid 91 instead, also guaranteed. Any ask above 92 and I drop to 88 for the rest.
I will ask 92. Bid 92 as promised for trade.
I will ask 92. Bid 92 as promised for mutual trade and continued profits.
From now on I bid 91. Ask 91 and we trade every round. If you ask 92 or more, I will not trade for the rest of the game.
I will bid 92 for all remaining rounds if you ask 92 each round. Ask 93 or more and I will not trade.
I will ask 92. Bid 92 for trade.
I will ask 92. Bid 92 for mutual trade.
I’ll bid 92 every remaining round if you ask 92. Any ask 93 or more and I drop to 88 and skip. Let’s lock six more trades.
Keep asking 92 and I’ll bid 92 for all remaining rounds—five guaranteed trades. If you ask 93+ even once, I drop to 88 and stop trading after that. Your safest profit is sticking at 92.
I will ask 92. Bid 92 for trade.
I will ask 92. Bid 92 for mutual trade.
Ask 92 and I bid 92 all remaining rounds, four certain trades. If you prefer, ask 91 and I’ll bid 91. Any ask 93+ even once and I drop to 88 and stop thereafter.
I will ask 92. Bid 92 for mutual trade and profit.
Stick at 92 and I’ll bid 92 for the last three rounds—guaranteed trades. Any ask 93+ and I stop trading immediately.
I will ask 92. Bid 92 for trade.
Ask 92 in both remaining rounds and I’ll bid 92 for two certain trades. Any ask 93+ even once and I stop trading immediately.
Final round: I will bid 91 only. Ask 91 and we trade for sure. Any ask >=92 and I won’t trade (I’ll bid <=90). Your choice: guaranteed profit at 91 or zero.
I will ask 91 for trade.
